reviews.review_title: Scamming game with vanishing mod menus!
reviews.review_description:
I bought a mod menu, paid cold hard cash for it and when I logged on the next day it had disappeared! 
I wish I had looked at the reviews before buying the mod menu because it seems that everyone who buys it gets scammed! I tried to get a refund and couldnt get one because it had been more than 2 hours since downloading it. I have a very large following on social media and will be telling everyone to avoid this game like the plague unless they want to get scammed.

The troll mod menu disappeared when I log in the game. I have to take time just to uninstall the game and reinstall the game over and over again. I hope the developers or owners see this and fix the problem because everyone is having the same problem.

reviews.review_title: THIS GAME IS STUPID AND UNIVERSAL LIED
reviews.review_description: I PAID 10 DOLLARS OF MY MONEY AND WHEN I TRIED TO USE THE MOD MENUS, IT DISAPPEARED. WOULD NOT RECOMMEND PLAYING THIS EVER. AND IT WANTS ME TO GO TO THE DISCORD AND ASK ONE OF THE MODERATORS FOR IT BACK. FIX YOU GODDAMN GAME UNIVERSAL
